content: SKIP — backoff computation is `src/pipeline.rs:390` (`2u64.pow(attempt + 1)`) followed by the sleep at `src/pipeline.rs:395`. `src/pipeline.rs` is FORBIDDEN in this batch. Jitter addition (`+ rand::random::<u64>() % (base/4)`) must be applied directly to that arithmetic; there is no separable helper file.
